title: WebSocket Real-Time Notifications
input_format: WebSocket connection events, notification payloads, room subscriptions
output_format: Real-time notification delivery to connected clients with acknowledgements
example_output: Client user1 receives: { type: 'new-order', data: {orderId: 123}, timestamp: '...' }
constraints: Must handle 10K concurrent connections. Must support rooms/channels. Must handle reconnection. Must deliver notifications in order. Must support acknowledgements.
function_signature: class NotificationServer { onConnection(socket): void; send(userId: string, notification: Notification): void; broadcast(room: string, notification: Notification): void; getOnlineUsers(): string[]; }
